evaluation.notes: CFD programmes: Instant Funding (no evaluation, 8% trailing drawdown), Lightning (7-day evaluation, 5% target, 3% daily / 4% trailing), One Phase (10% target, 3% daily / 6% trailing), Two Phase (10%/5% targets, 4% daily / 10% trailing), Three Phase (5% per phase, 5% daily / 10% static). Crypto programmes: Crypto Instant Funding (no evaluation, 3% daily drawdown, 6% max trailing drawdown, 25% consistency rule, 7 min trading days before payout, 7-day inactivity limit) and Crypto Standard 1 Step (9% profit target, 3% daily drawdown, 6% max trailing drawdown, 25% consistency rule, 4 min trading days in eval, 7 min trading days funded, 7-day inactivity limit). Crypto leverage: 5:1 on BTC/ETH/SOL, 2:1 on other crypto. Crypto payout: $50 minimum profit target payout, lock upon payout applies. Crypto news trading: not allowed 5 minutes before or after events. TradingView on crypto: available (coming soon). All accounts use simulated trading environments.

pricing.refundPolicy: Challenge fee refunded with first profitable payout

payouts.schedule: On-demand first payout (eval accounts); bi-weekly thereafter; 14-day cycle (Instant Funding)

rules.notes: CFD programmes: Instant Funding, Lightning, One Phase, Two Phase, Three Phase. Crypto programmes: Crypto Instant Funding and Crypto Standard (1 Step). Lightning: no weekend holding, no news trading within 5 min of events, stop-loss required. Crypto programmes: no news trading 5 min before/after events, 25% consistency rule, 7-day inactivity limit, $50 minimum profit target payout, lock upon payout applies. EAs allowed on MT4/MT5 only (not DXTrade or Lightning). Copy trading allowed between own FXIFY accounts; third-party copy trading requires verification. HFT, latency arbitrage, tick scalping prohibited. Add-ons: 90% profit split (+20% fee), bi-weekly payouts (+5%), performance protect (+15%), 50:1 leverage (+25%). Crypto leverage: 5:1 BTC/ETH/SOL, 2:1 other crypto.

markets.instruments: Forex, Indices, Commodities, Stocks, Crypto (300+ symbols on CFD; 80+ crypto assets on crypto programmes)
